source_receipts.anchor: MetaGxOvarian 16 pooled cohorts n=2446: cohort-stratified Co

verbatim_evidence.claim: Binary, platform-portable transcriptional fingerprint (FAP below and CXCL10 above within-cohort means) that marks a favorable-overall-survival HGSOC subgroup (24.4% of patients).
PROGNOSTIC ONLY, NOT PREDICTIVE. Does not predict response to any specific therapy. External validation on GSE32062 DID

attributes.what_it_does: Binary, platform-portable transcriptional fingerprint (FAP below and CXCL10 above within-cohort means) that marks a favorable-overall-survival HGSOC subgroup (24.4% of patients).
attributes.validated_on: MetaGxOvarian 16 pooled cohorts n=2446: cohort-stratified Cox HR=0.7208 (95% CI 0.6282-0.8270, p=3.05e-6); per-cohort 11/16 concordant (Stouffer z=2.32, p=0.0202)
attributes.cannot_do: PROGNOSTIC ONLY, NOT PREDICTIVE. Does not predict response to any specific therapy. External validation on GSE32062 DID NOT HOLD (logrank p=0.929). Selection use requires prospective, treatment-stratified testing on the intended endpoint.
